headline: Northern Trust Selects ICE ETF Hub to Support U.S. ETF Servicing Launch
summary: CHICAGO, March 11, 2026--Northern Trust's selection of ICE ETF Hub is a key milestone in its strategic entry into the U.S. institutional investor ETF servicing market.
